description_long: This is a five-arm chandelier-style sconce suspended from a chain, featuring fabric lampshades with a quilted texture and decorative bows tied around each shade. The central body is composed of a turned spindle with ornate, curved metal arms extending outward to support each lampshade. The chain and metalwork have a distressed, matte finish, giving the fixture a vintage or rustic appearance. Each lampshade appears to be made of a light-colored fabric, possibly linen or cotton, and is gathered at the top with a ribbon. The overall design is both elegant and homey, blending traditional and cottage aesthetics. The fixture is intended to be mounted from the ceiling and would provide ambient lighting in a residential or boutique urban setting.
description: A five-arm chandelier sconce with quilted fabric lampshades, decorative bows, and a vintage metal frame suspended by a chain. The design is rustic and elegant, suitable for ceiling mounting.
description_view_0: Front view showing all five fabric lampshades, bows, and the central spindle with symmetrical arm arrangement.
description_view_1: Angled side view highlighting the depth of the arms and the layered arrangement of the shades.
description_view_2: Rear view with a clear look at the chain, central spindle, and the backs of the lampshades.
description_view_3: Opposite angled side view, showing the bows and the curvature of the metal arms from a different perspective.
attribute_fixture_design: The fixture has a vintage, rustic design with quilted fabric shades, decorative bows, and a distressed metal frame. Its style blends traditional elegance with a cozy, cottage-inspired aesthetic.
